title: ONYX Totem Of Undying
description: Changes The Vanilla Totem Texture To A Darker / Cleaner One
body:
## **About**

This texture pack replaces the default Totem of Undying with a sleek, dark-themed version, giving it a more mysterious and ominous look. The redesigned totem features deep shadows, muted tones, and subtle glowing accents that stand out without being too bright. Perfect for players who prefer a darker aesthetic, it adds a stylish twist while keeping the original shape recognizable.

Less colors = more focus.

**Vanilla+
16x**
